page: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server powered by an Intel Xeon 8559C processor. It features 96 vCPUs across 48 physical cores with a base clock speed of 3.6 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 768.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. It is equipped with a massive 60,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance across multiple domains. Multi-core CPU performance is highly rated, with top-tier results in Passmark CPU scores, physics tests, and extended instructions. The server excels in data processing, achieving top-tier ratings in software compilation, image processing, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, scoring in the top 25% for both small and large block read and write operations.

The inclusion of advanced CPU instructions, such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), enables accelerated cryptographic and vector calculations. This is reflected in top-tier performance for database operations, static web serving, and prompt processing for large language models. Given its massive 60 TB local NVMe storage and high resource density, the server offers high qualitative cost efficiency for data-intensive workloads that require bare-metal access without virtualization overhead. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, real-time analytics, and high-throughput transactional systems.
description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server designed for high-throughput, data-intensive workloads. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8559C processor with 96 vCPUs, 48 physical cores, and a 3.6 GHz clock speed on an x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 6 GHz and a massive 60,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, complemented by a 50 Gbps baseline network speed. Benchmark data highlights top-tier performance in database operations, multi-threaded decompression, and software compilation, alongside strong memory bandwidth. With advanced hardware features like Intel AMX and AVX-512, this server is highly efficient for large-scale databases, real-time analytics, and high-throughput transactional systems requiring direct bare-metal hardware access.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.metal-24xl is a storage-optimized bare-metal server featuring 96 vCPUs, 768 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 60,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity bare-metal platform combining massive local NVMe storage, DDR5 memory, and advanced Intel Xeon processing for data-intensive workloads.

60,000 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
768.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz
